source_name: UK Statutory RSHE — Full Programme (DfE July 2025)

criteria.criterion_statement: I can identify and name body parts using correct anatomical terms.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot name basic body parts.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Names some basic body parts with prompting.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Names most body parts but may use informal terms.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Confidently identifies and names body parts using correct anatomical terminology.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Uses precise anatomical terms and explains body part functions.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can explain which body parts are private.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify private body parts.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Shows basic awareness of body privacy concepts.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Identifies some private body parts with guidance.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Clearly explains which body parts are private and why privacy matters.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Articulates privacy concepts and applies understanding to scenarios.

prerequisite_edges_detail.rationale: Students must know anatomical terms before they can understand which specific body parts are private.

criteria.criterion_statement: Learners can articulate their personal boundaries regarding physical contact and privacy in clear, age-appropriate language.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot express any personal boundaries.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Identifies some boundaries but struggles to communicate them clearly.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Communicates basic boundaries with some clarity and appropriate language.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Clearly articulates personal boundaries using confident, age-appropriate language in various contexts.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Articulates boundaries with nuanced understanding of different situations.

prerequisite_edges_detail.rationale: Understanding which body parts are private is foundational to articulating personal boundaries regarding physical contact and privacy.

criteria.criterion_statement: Apply foundational relationship skills to build and maintain positive connections with others.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: No demonstration of relationship-building skills.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Shows basic awareness of positive relationship elements.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Applies some foundational skills with guidance to build connections.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Consistently applies foundational relationship skills to build and maintain positive connections effectively.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Adapts relationship skills flexibly across diverse social contexts.

criteria.criterion_statement: Apply safety knowledge to keep themselves and others safe in relationships.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: No demonstration of safety awareness.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Shows basic awareness of safety concepts in relationships.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Applies some safety knowledge with guidance to protect self and others.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Consistently applies safety knowledge to keep themselves and others safe in relationship contexts.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Demonstrates sophisticated safety awareness across complex relationship scenarios.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can apply skills to manage difficult feelings such as disappointment or anger in challenging friendship situations.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: No strategies demonstrated for managing difficult feelings.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Shows basic awareness of difficult feelings but limited management strategies.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Applies some appropriate strategies to manage difficult feelings with guidance.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Consistently applies effective strategies to manage difficult feelings like disappointment or anger in friendships.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Adapts and refines emotion management strategies across varied challenging situations.

prerequisite_edges_detail.rationale: Basic relationship skills should be established before tackling more complex emotional management in challenging situations.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can reflect on how to behave with kindness in complex or challenging relationship situations.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: No reflection on kind behaviors demonstrated.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Shows basic awareness of kindness but limited reflection on application.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Reflects on some appropriate kind behaviors with prompting or guidance.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Thoughtfully reflects on and identifies appropriate kind behaviors for complex relationship challenges.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Demonstrates sophisticated reflection on kindness strategies across diverse relationship contexts.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can identify different types of family structures and their defining characteristics.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify any family types or characteristics.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Identifies basic family types with minimal detail about characteristics.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Identifies several family types and describes some key characteristics accurately.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Identifies diverse family structures and describes their characteristics, including legal and social aspects.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Comprehensively explains family diversity with nuanced understanding of characteristics.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can identify different forms of abuse including emotional, physical, sexual, domestic, and exploitative abuse.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify any forms of abuse.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Identifies basic physical abuse but struggles with other forms.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Identifies most common forms of abuse with some gaps in understanding.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Accurately identifies various forms of abuse including emotional, physical, sexual, domestic and exploitative types.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Identifies complex abuse patterns and understands interconnected forms.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can recognise when situations are unsafe or harmful including online risks and family relationship concerns.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot recognise unsafe situations.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Recognises obvious physical dangers but misses subtle risks.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Recognises most unsafe situations but may miss online or emotional risks.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Accurately recognises unsafe situations across physical, online and relationship contexts including reporting needs.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Recognises complex risk patterns and anticipates potential unsafe developments.

prerequisite_edges_detail.rationale: Students must identify forms of abuse before they can recognize unsafe situations that may involve abuse.

criteria.criterion_statement: Explain personal rights and legal protections related to safety and abuse.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify basic personal rights or protections.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Names some personal rights but explanations lack detail or accuracy.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Explains basic personal rights and some legal protections with minor gaps.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Clearly explains personal rights, boundaries, and key legal protections including relevant legislation.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Comprehensively explains rights and legal frameworks with nuanced understanding.

criteria.criterion_statement: Explain how to seek help and support when safety is compromised.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify ways to seek help.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Names some sources of help but lacks understanding of processes.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Explains basic help-seeking processes with some understanding of available support.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Clearly explains multiple ways to seek help, including reporting procedures and support services.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Comprehensively explains help-seeking strategies with understanding of different contexts.

prerequisite_edges_detail.rationale: Recognizing unsafe situations is prerequisite to knowing how to seek help when safety is compromised.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can identify the key characteristics that make friendships positive, caring, and supportive.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify any friendship characteristics.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Identifies one or two basic friendship characteristics with prompting.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Identifies several friendship characteristics but may miss key elements like trust or respect.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Clearly identifies multiple key characteristics including mutual respect, trust, kindness, and support that define healthy friendships.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Identifies comprehensive range of characteristics and their interconnected nature in friendships.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can explain how people choose and make friends and understand friendship dynamics.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot explain friendship formation or dynamics.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Shows basic awareness of how friendships form with significant gaps.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Explains some aspects of friendship formation and recognises that friendships have challenges.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Clearly explains how friendships develop, acknowledges that loneliness is normal, and understands that friendship difficulties can be resolved.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Demonstrates sophisticated understanding of friendship processes and emotional dynamics involved.

criteria.criterion_statement: Apply strategies to build caring and kind friendships.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: No strategies demonstrated for building friendships.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Shows basic awareness of friendship-building strategies with limited application.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Applies some appropriate strategies to build caring friendships with occasional guidance.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Consistently applies effective strategies to build caring, kind friendships independently.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Adapts and refines friendship-building strategies for diverse social contexts.

prerequisite_edges_detail.rationale: Students must identify characteristics of positive friendships before they can apply strategies to build them.

criteria.criterion_statement: Recognise when a friendship is unhealthy and respond appropriately to seek support.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify unhealthy friendship patterns or responses.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Shows basic recognition of friendship problems with limited response strategies.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Identifies some unhealthy friendship patterns and knows basic support-seeking steps.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Recognises unhealthy friendship dynamics and responds appropriately by seeking needed support.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Evaluates complex friendship challenges and implements sophisticated response strategies.

prerequisite_edges_detail.rationale: Understanding positive friendship characteristics is necessary to recognize when a friendship is unhealthy.

criteria.criterion_statement: Learners can communicate assertively to express their needs and set appropriate boundaries in relationships.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: No demonstration of assertive communication or boundary setting.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Basic attempts at expressing needs with limited clarity or confidence.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Clear expression of needs and boundaries with some assertiveness in familiar contexts.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Confident assertive communication expressing needs and setting appropriate boundaries across different relationship contexts.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Sophisticated assertive communication adapting approach effectively to complex relationship dynamics.

criteria.criterion_statement: Learners can manage their emotions effectively when communicating needs and navigating relationship challenges.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: No evidence of emotional management during communication.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Limited awareness of emotions with basic attempts at self-regulation.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Recognises emotions and applies some strategies to manage feelings during interactions.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Effectively manages emotions including disappointment and frustration while maintaining respectful communication and building self-esteem.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Sophisticated emotional regulation supporting complex relationship navigation and personal development.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can identify different types of bullying including online bullying.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify any bullying types.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Identifies one or two basic bullying types.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Identifies several bullying types with some gaps.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Accurately identifies multiple types of bullying including online forms.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Identifies comprehensive range of bullying types with nuanced understanding.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can identify what stereotypes are and how they can be unfair, negative, destructive or lead to bullying.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify what stereotypes are.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Basic understanding of what stereotypes are.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Identifies stereotypes and some negative aspects.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Clearly identifies stereotypes and explains how they can be harmful or lead to bullying.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Sophisticated understanding of stereotypes and their destructive potential.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can explain the harmful impacts of bullying and understand bystander responsibilities including reporting to adults.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot explain bullying impacts.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Basic awareness of some bullying effects.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Explains some impacts and basic bystander roles.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Clearly explains bullying impacts and bystander responsibilities including reporting procedures.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Comprehensive explanation of impacts with sophisticated understanding of intervention.

prerequisite_edges_detail.rationale: Students must identify types of bullying before they can explain its harmful impacts and bystander responsibilities.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can challenge stereotypes using appropriate strategies and reasoning.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: No attempt to challenge stereotypes.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Recognises stereotypes but struggles to challenge them effectively.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Challenges stereotypes with basic reasoning but lacks consistency or depth.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Consistently challenges stereotypes using clear reasoning and appropriate strategies for the context.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Challenges stereotypes with sophisticated reasoning and adapts approach to different situations.

prerequisite_edges_detail.rationale: Understanding what stereotypes are and their harmful effects is necessary before learning to challenge them.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can seek appropriate help when bullying occurs or when concerned about violence or harm.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: No attempt to seek help.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Recognises need for help but unsure how to access it.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Seeks help but may choose inappropriate sources or methods.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Consistently identifies appropriate help sources and uses effective strategies to access support when needed.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Demonstrates sophisticated judgment in selecting help sources and supports others in accessing help.

criteria.criterion_statement: Identify online risks including fake profiles, inappropriate content, scams, and dangers from unknown contacts.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify any online risks.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Identifies basic risks like strangers online.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Identifies multiple risks including fake profiles and inappropriate content.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Identifies comprehensive range of online risks including scams, fake content, and contact dangers.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Identifies sophisticated risks including AI-generated content and deepfakes.

criteria.criterion_statement: Explain safety principles for protecting personal information including privacy settings, sharing limitations, and legal considerations.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot explain any safety principles.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Explains basic privacy concepts like not sharing personal information.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Explains privacy settings and permanence of online content.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Explains comprehensive safety principles including legal implications and information protection strategies.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Explains sophisticated safety principles including legal nuances and advanced privacy concepts.

criteria.criterion_statement: Explain principles for safe digital relationships including respectful behavior and appropriate boundaries online.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot explain digital relationship principles.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Explains basic online respect concepts.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Explains how online and offline behavior standards connect.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Explains comprehensive principles for respectful digital relationships and appropriate online boundaries.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Explains sophisticated relationship principles including impact of distorted online content.

criteria.criterion_statement: Identify sources of support and advice for online safety concerns and incidents.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify support sources.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Identifies basic help sources like teachers.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Identifies multiple support sources including school and external help.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Identifies comprehensive range of appropriate support sources for different online safety concerns.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Identifies specialized support sources and understands when different types are needed.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can critically evaluate online relationships and sources of information to assess their trustworthiness and safety.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot assess online relationships or information sources.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Shows basic awareness that online relationships need evaluation.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Applies some criteria to evaluate online relationships and sources.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Systematically evaluates online relationships and information sources using multiple trustworthiness indicators.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Evaluates complex online scenarios with sophisticated critical thinking.

prerequisite_edges_detail.rationale: Identifying online risks is foundational to critically evaluating online relationships and information sources.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can identify harmful online content, contact, and situations including deepfakes, scams, and abusive behaviour.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot recognise harmful online content or situations.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Identifies obvious harmful content with prompting.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Recognises common forms of harmful content and contact.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Identifies various types of harmful online situations including sophisticated threats like deepfakes and scams.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Anticipates emerging threats and recognises subtle manipulation tactics.

prerequisite_edges_detail.rationale: Understanding basic safety principles for protecting information helps students identify more complex harmful content and situations.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can apply appropriate response strategies including reporting, seeking support, and managing pressure situations online.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot respond appropriately to online threats.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Shows awareness that help should be sought.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Applies basic response strategies like reporting or blocking.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Selects and implements appropriate response strategies for different online threat scenarios effectively.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Adapts response strategies to complex situations and supports others.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can distinguish between trustworthy and untrustworthy people based on their behaviour and intentions.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify trustworthy versus untrustworthy people.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Shows basic awareness that some people may not be trustworthy.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Identifies obvious signs of trustworthy and untrustworthy behaviour with guidance.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Accurately distinguishes trustworthy from untrustworthy people using multiple behavioural indicators and contextual clues.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Recognises subtle deceptive behaviours and explains complex trust dynamics.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can recognise unsafe situations and inappropriate contact in various contexts.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify unsafe situations or inappropriate contact.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Shows basic awareness that some situations may be unsafe.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Identifies obvious unsafe situations and inappropriate contact with support.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Accurately recognises unsafe situations and inappropriate contact across different contexts including online environments.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Identifies subtle safety risks and explains potential consequences comprehensively.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can respond safely and appropriately when encountering potentially unsafe people or situations.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot respond appropriately to unsafe situations.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Shows basic understanding of need to respond to safety risks.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Demonstrates simple safety responses with guidance and prompting.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Consistently applies appropriate safety responses across various contexts and situations effectively.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Adapts safety responses strategically and helps others respond appropriately.

prerequisite_edges_detail.rationale: Distinguishing trustworthy from untrustworthy people is necessary before learning to respond safely to potentially unsafe situations.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can use appropriate vocabulary to describe safety concerns, abuse, or feelings of being unsafe.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot use safety vocabulary appropriately.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Uses basic safety words with significant prompting.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Uses some appropriate safety vocabulary with minor prompting.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Uses clear, appropriate vocabulary to describe safety concerns and feelings of being unsafe.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Uses precise safety vocabulary confidently in various contexts.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can report safety concerns through appropriate channels and seek help when needed.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify or use help-seeking channels.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Identifies some help sources with significant guidance.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Can seek help through familiar channels with some support.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Effectively reports concerns and seeks help through appropriate channels when needed.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Confidently navigates multiple help-seeking options and supports others.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can explain the foundational elements of healthy romantic relationships including consent, trust, respect, boundaries, and communication.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify relationship elements
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Names some basic relationship elements with limited understanding
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Explains several relationship elements with basic connections to health
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Clearly explains key relationship elements and their role in creating healthy romantic partnerships
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Explains relationship elements with nuanced understanding of interconnections

criteria.criterion_statement: I can explain how power dynamics and inequalities affect behaviour and respect within romantic relationships.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify power dynamics
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Shows basic awareness that power differences exist in relationships
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Explains some ways power imbalances affect relationship behaviour
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Clearly explains how power inequalities impact respect and behaviour in romantic relationships
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Explains power dynamics with sophisticated understanding of systemic influences

criteria.criterion_statement: I can explain how ethical behaviour in relationships goes beyond consent to include care, kindness, and awareness of vulnerabilities.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot distinguish ethics from consent
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Shows basic awareness that relationships involve more than consent
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Explains some ethical considerations beyond consent in relationships
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Clearly explains how ethical behaviour encompasses care, kindness and vulnerability awareness beyond consent
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Explains ethical relationship behaviour with nuanced understanding of moral complexity

criteria.criterion_statement: I can explain how external influences like stereotypes and pornography can negatively impact relationship attitudes and behaviours.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify external influences
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Shows basic awareness that outside factors affect relationships
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Explains some ways stereotypes or media influence relationship attitudes
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Clearly explains how stereotypes and pornography can negatively shape relationship behaviours and attitudes
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Explains external influences with sophisticated understanding of societal impact mechanisms

criteria.criterion_statement: I can explain the importance of self-esteem and independence in supporting healthy relationships with others.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot connect self-relationship to others
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Shows basic awareness that self-esteem matters for relationships
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Explains some connections between self-esteem and relationship health
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Clearly explains how positive self-relationship and independence support healthy romantic relationships
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Explains self-relationship foundations with sophisticated understanding of psychological connections

criteria.criterion_statement: I can evaluate how stereotypes, power imbalances, and cultural influences affect relationship dynamics.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: No evaluation of relationship influences shown.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Basic recognition of some stereotypes or cultural influences on relationships.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Identifies multiple influences but evaluation lacks depth or connection to dynamics.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Clearly evaluates how stereotypes, power imbalances, and cultural factors shape relationship patterns and interactions.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Sophisticated analysis connecting multiple influences to complex relationship outcomes.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can apply strategies for managing conflict and relationship endings.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: No strategies for conflict or endings demonstrated.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Shows awareness of need for strategies but application is unclear.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Applies basic strategies with some effectiveness in straightforward situations.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Effectively applies appropriate strategies for managing conflict and ending relationships with kindness and emotional awareness.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Adapts sophisticated strategies flexibly across diverse relationship challenges.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can recognise consent and boundaries in relationships including early romantic and sexual relationships.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify consent or boundary indicators.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Identifies basic consent signals with significant support.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Recognises clear consent and boundary indicators in familiar contexts.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Accurately identifies consent and boundaries across various relationship contexts including romantic situations.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Analyses subtle consent cues and complex boundary dynamics.

prerequisite_edges_detail.rationale: Understanding foundational elements of healthy relationships including consent is prerequisite to recognizing consent and boundaries in practice.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can respect consent and boundaries in relationships including early romantic and sexual relationships.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Does not demonstrate respect for boundaries.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Shows basic respect for clear boundaries with reminders.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Consistently respects explicit consent and boundaries in interactions.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Demonstrates respectful behaviour regarding consent and boundaries across relationship contexts including romantic situations.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Models exemplary respect and helps others understand boundaries.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can communicate consent and boundaries in relationships including early romantic and sexual relationships.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot express personal boundaries or consent.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Communicates basic boundaries with significant support and prompting.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Clearly expresses personal boundaries and consent in familiar situations.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Effectively communicates consent and boundaries across various relationship contexts including romantic situations.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Articulates complex boundary needs and facilitates consent discussions.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can explain the principles of sexual consent including that it can be given, withheld or removed at any time.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot explain consent principles.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Basic understanding that consent exists but unclear about key principles.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Explains some consent principles but misses key aspects like withdrawal.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Clearly explains consent can be given, withheld or removed, with understanding of broader considerations.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Comprehensive explanation linking consent to care, respect and contextual factors.

prerequisite_edges_detail.rationale: Basic recognition of consent must precede understanding the complex principles of sexual consent including withdrawal.

criteria.criterion_statement: Explain contraceptive options including efficacy, availability, and proper use of barrier methods.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify any contraceptive methods.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Names some contraceptive methods with limited detail.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Describes several contraceptive options with basic efficacy information.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Explains range of contraceptive choices with accurate efficacy and availability details.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Compares contraceptive methods with nuanced understanding of suitability factors.

criteria.criterion_statement: Explain pregnancy options including keeping the baby, adoption, and abortion with accurate information sources.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify pregnancy options.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Names some pregnancy choices with minimal detail.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Describes pregnancy options with basic understanding of each choice.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Explains all pregnancy options with medically accurate information and support sources.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Discusses pregnancy choices with comprehensive understanding of implications and resources.

criteria.criterion_statement: Explain STI prevention methods, testing importance, and treatment facts including prevalence and health impacts.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify STI prevention methods.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Names basic prevention methods with limited understanding.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Describes prevention strategies and testing with some accuracy.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Explains comprehensive STI prevention including safer sex, testing, treatment, and stigma factors.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Discusses STI prevention with detailed understanding of risk reduction and health implications.

criteria.criterion_statement: Explain reproductive health facts including fertility, menstrual health, menopause, and lifestyle impacts.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot explain reproductive health concepts.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Shows basic awareness of reproductive health topics.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Describes reproductive health facts with some accuracy and detail.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Explains reproductive health including fertility, menstrual conditions, and lifestyle factors accurately.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Discusses reproductive health with comprehensive understanding of interconnected factors.

criteria.criterion_statement: Explain how sexual and relationship choices affect overall health and wellbeing across multiple dimensions.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot connect choices to health outcomes.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Shows basic awareness that choices affect health.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Describes some connections between sexual choices and health impacts.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Explains how sexual and relationship choices affect physical, emotional, mental, and reproductive health.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Analyzes complex relationships between choices and multidimensional health outcomes.

criteria.criterion_statement: Identify where to access confidential sexual health services and support for relationship concerns.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify support sources.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Names some basic support services.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Identifies several support sources with basic access information.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Explains where to access confidential sexual health services and relationship support effectively.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Demonstrates comprehensive knowledge of support systems and appropriate referral pathways.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can evaluate the medical accuracy and reliability of sexual health information from various sources.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot assess information reliability
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Shows basic awareness of information quality differences
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Identifies some reliable vs unreliable sources with guidance
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Systematically evaluates sexual health information using clear criteria for medical accuracy
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Critically analyses complex information with nuanced quality judgements

prerequisite_edges_detail.rationale: Basic knowledge of contraceptive options provides foundation for evaluating medical accuracy of sexual health information.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can signpost others to medically accurate sexual health information and support services.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot direct others to resources
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Knows some basic sexual health resources exist
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Can identify appropriate resources with some guidance needed
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Effectively directs others to relevant, medically accurate sexual health resources
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Tailors signposting to specific needs and circumstances

criteria.criterion_statement: I can counter sexual health misinformation using evidence-based responses.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot address misinformation
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Recognises some information as potentially incorrect
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Attempts to correct misinformation with basic responses
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Effectively challenges misinformation using clear, evidence-based explanations
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Addresses complex misinformation with sophisticated reasoning

criteria.criterion_statement: I can identify and name different emotions that people experience in various situations.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot name basic emotions
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Names few basic emotions with support
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Identifies several emotions in familiar situations
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Accurately identifies range of emotions across different situations
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Identifies subtle emotional variations and mixed feelings

criteria.criterion_statement: I can explain mental health concepts including normal emotional responses, mental health conditions, and the distinction between them.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot explain mental health concepts
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Shows basic awareness of mental health
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Explains some mental health concepts with guidance
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Clearly explains mental health concepts and normal vs concerning responses
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Explains complex mental health relationships and nuances

criteria.criterion_statement: I can describe factors and activities that support or harm mental wellbeing and happiness.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot describe wellbeing factors
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Describes few basic wellbeing factors
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Describes several factors affecting wellbeing
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Clearly describes range of factors that support or harm wellbeing
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Describes complex wellbeing relationships and protective strategies

criteria.criterion_statement: I can identify appropriate sources of help and support for mental health concerns.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify help sources
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Identifies one basic help source
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Identifies several appropriate help sources
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Clearly identifies range of appropriate support sources for different situations
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Identifies specialized support and explains when to access different sources

criteria.criterion_statement: I can recognise and accurately describe emotional states in myself and others using appropriate vocabulary.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify basic emotions in self or others.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Identifies simple emotions with basic vocabulary.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Recognises range of emotions using varied vocabulary appropriately.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Accurately identifies and describes complex emotional states in self and others using precise, sensitive vocabulary.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Demonstrates nuanced emotional recognition with sophisticated vocabulary.

prerequisite_edges_detail.rationale: Identifying emotions in general is foundational to recognizing and describing emotional states in oneself and others.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can judge whether emotional responses and behaviours are appropriate and when support is needed.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot assess appropriateness of emotional responses.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Makes basic judgments about obvious emotional concerns.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Evaluates emotional responses and identifies clear support triggers.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Accurately judges appropriateness of emotions and behaviours, recognising when professional support is needed.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Makes sophisticated judgments about complex emotional situations.

prerequisite_edges_detail.rationale: Understanding mental health concepts is necessary before judging whether emotional responses are appropriate.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can seek help and communicate about mental health concerns using appropriate language and approaches.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot seek help for mental health concerns.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Attempts basic help-seeking with simple language.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Seeks appropriate help using clear, sensitive communication.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Effectively seeks help for self and others using accurate, appropriate language about mental health concerns.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Demonstrates sophisticated help-seeking and mental health communication.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can identify the risks of online activities and their impact on wellbeing.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify any digital risks or impacts.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Identifies basic digital risks with limited understanding of impacts.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Identifies several digital risks and some impacts on wellbeing with guidance.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Clearly identifies various digital risks and explains their impacts on personal and others' wellbeing.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Comprehensively identifies risks and analyses complex impacts on wellbeing.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can identify the benefits of online activities and their impact on wellbeing.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify any digital benefits or impacts.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Identifies basic digital benefits with limited understanding of impacts.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Identifies some digital benefits and their positive impacts with guidance.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Clearly identifies various digital benefits and explains their positive impacts on wellbeing.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Comprehensively identifies benefits and analyses their complex positive impacts.

criteria.criterion_statement: Evaluate online content critically to determine its appropriateness and reliability.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot assess online content quality or appropriateness.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Shows basic awareness that online content varies in quality.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Applies some criteria to evaluate content but inconsistently.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Systematically evaluates content using multiple criteria for appropriateness and reliability.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Evaluates content with sophisticated critical thinking skills.

criteria.criterion_statement: Evaluate online relationships and their impact on personal wellbeing and in-person connections.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot assess online relationship quality or impact.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Shows basic understanding of online relationship differences.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Identifies some pros and cons of online relationships.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Thoughtfully evaluates how online relationships complement or conflict with in-person connections.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Demonstrates nuanced understanding of relationship dynamics across contexts.

criteria.criterion_statement: Identify appropriate support resources and reporting mechanisms for online safety concerns.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify digital safety support options.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Knows some basic support options exist online.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Identifies several appropriate support resources and reporting methods.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Confidently identifies and accesses appropriate support for various digital safety concerns.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Guides others in accessing digital safety support.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can identify key facts about nutrition, including caloric content, characteristics of healthy and poor diets, and associated health risks.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify basic nutritional facts or diet-health connections.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Identifies some basic nutritional facts but with significant gaps or inaccuracies.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Identifies most key nutritional facts and some diet-health connections with minor gaps.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Accurately identifies comprehensive nutritional facts, diet characteristics, and associated health risks including obesity and disease links.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Demonstrates detailed nutritional knowledge with sophisticated understanding of diet-health relationships.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can identify key facts about physical activity, including benefits, recommended practices, and health consequences of inactivity.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify basic physical activity facts or benefits.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Identifies some physical activity benefits but with limited understanding of recommendations.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Identifies most physical activity facts and some health connections with minor gaps.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Accurately identifies comprehensive physical activity facts, recommended practices, and links between inactivity and cardiovascular ill-health.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Demonstrates detailed understanding of physical activity's role in maintaining optimal health.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can identify key facts about substance use, including legal status, health risks, and safety information for alcohol, tobacco, vaping, and illegal drugs.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify basic substance use facts or risks.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Identifies some substance risks but with significant gaps in legal or health knowledge.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Identifies most substance facts and risks with some understanding of safety measures.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Accurately identifies comprehensive substance facts including legal status, health risks, addiction potential, and safety strategies across multiple substances.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Demonstrates sophisticated understanding of substance-related health risks and harm reduction approaches.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can identify key facts about hygiene practices, infection control, and preventive health measures including dental care, handwashing, and vaccination.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify basic hygiene or prevention facts.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Identifies some hygiene practices but with limited understanding of infection control.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Identifies most hygiene and prevention facts with some understanding of health benefits.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Accurately identifies comprehensive hygiene practices, infection control measures, and preventive health facts including vaccination and dental care.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Demonstrates detailed understanding of how preventive measures protect against various health threats.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can identify key facts about sleep, health monitoring, and general health maintenance including sleep requirements, health screening, and recognising illness signs.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify basic sleep or health monitoring facts.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Identifies some sleep requirements but limited understanding of health monitoring practices.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Identifies most sleep and health monitoring facts with some understanding of their importance.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Accurately identifies comprehensive facts about sleep requirements, health screening benefits, illness recognition, and appropriate health support sources.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Demonstrates sophisticated understanding of how sleep and health monitoring contribute to overall wellbeing.

criteria.criterion_statement: The learner can determine when health support is needed by recognising concerning symptoms or situations.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify when health support is needed.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Identifies obvious health emergencies requiring immediate support.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Recognises clear symptoms and situations that warrant health support.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Accurately determines when health support is needed across various symptoms and situations.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Evaluates complex health scenarios to determine appropriate support timing.

criteria.criterion_statement: The learner can identify appropriate sources of health support and explain how to access them effectively.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify sources of health support.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Names basic health support sources like parents or doctors.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Identifies multiple appropriate sources and basic access methods.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Explains how to effectively access various trusted adults and healthcare professionals for support.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Evaluates and selects optimal support sources based on specific health concerns.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can identify appropriate healthcare services for different health needs.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify any healthcare services.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Identifies basic healthcare services with significant gaps.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Identifies most healthcare services but with some confusion about appropriateness.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Accurately identifies appropriate healthcare services for a range of different health needs.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Identifies comprehensive healthcare options including specialist services.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can explain how to access healthcare services.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot explain access procedures.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Explains basic access steps with major gaps.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Explains access procedures but misses some important steps or details.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Clearly explains practical steps to access various healthcare services including referral processes.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Explains comprehensive access pathways including alternative routes.

prerequisite_edges_detail.rationale: Students must identify appropriate healthcare services before they can explain how to access them.

criteria.criterion_statement: Explain the legal framework for medical consent for children under 16, including parental responsibility and Gillick competence.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: No understanding of under-16 consent rules.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Basic awareness that parents consent for young children.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Understands parental responsibility but limited knowledge of Gillick competence.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Clearly explains parental consent responsibility and Gillick competence for under-16s.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Analyses complex scenarios involving Gillick competence assessment.

criteria.criterion_statement: Explain circumstances where someone over 16 may lack capacity to make medical treatment decisions.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: No understanding of capacity limitations over 16.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Basic awareness that capacity can vary.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Identifies some circumstances affecting capacity in over-16s.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Clearly explains various circumstances that may affect capacity for over-16s.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Analyses complex capacity scenarios and legal implications.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can identify potential hazards and safety risks in different environments and situations.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify basic safety hazards or risks.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Identifies obvious hazards in familiar environments with prompting.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Identifies common hazards and risks in familiar environments independently.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Identifies potential hazards and assesses safety risks across different environments and situations effectively.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Identifies subtle risks and anticipates hazards in complex or unfamiliar situations.

criteria.criterion_statement: Implement safety strategies in various environments including roads, railways, water, and unfamiliar social or work settings.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: No safety strategies demonstrated.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Basic safety awareness with limited strategy implementation.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Some safety strategies applied but inconsistently across contexts.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Consistently implements appropriate safety strategies across various environments and situations.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Adapts and refines safety strategies for complex or novel situations.

prerequisite_edges_detail.rationale: Identifying hazards and safety risks is prerequisite to implementing safety strategies in various environments.

criteria.criterion_statement: Recognise and manage peer influence in relation to risk-taking behaviour and personal safety.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: No recognition of peer influence.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Limited awareness of peer pressure in safety contexts.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Recognises peer influence but struggles to manage it effectively.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Consistently recognises and effectively manages peer influence on safety decisions.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Helps others recognise and manage peer influence effectively.

criteria.criterion_statement: Seek appropriate help when facing safety concerns including grooming, exploitation, or other threats.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: No help-seeking demonstrated.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Limited awareness of when help is needed.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Recognises need for help but uncertain about appropriate sources.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Consistently identifies when help is needed and seeks appropriate support effectively.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Guides others in recognising when and how to seek help.

criteria.criterion_statement: Apply conflict resolution and self-management skills in contexts involving conflict and violence.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: No conflict management skills shown.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Basic awareness of conflict but limited management skills.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Some conflict management skills but inconsistent application.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Effectively applies self-management and conflict resolution skills in challenging situations.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Demonstrates advanced conflict resolution and supports others effectively.

criteria.criterion_statement: Explain the physical changes that occur during puberty and adolescence.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify any physical changes during puberty.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Names few basic physical changes with limited understanding.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Describes several physical changes but explanations lack detail or accuracy.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Clearly explains multiple physical changes during puberty with accurate understanding of the process.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Comprehensively explains physical changes with detailed understanding of timing and variation.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can identify when physical or mental health issues require attention.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify health concerns requiring attention.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Identifies obvious physical health issues but misses mental health concerns.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Identifies clear physical and mental health issues with some prompting.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Accurately identifies when physical and mental health issues require professional attention or intervention.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Identifies subtle health concerns and explains urgency levels appropriately.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can apply strategies to protect my own health and wellbeing.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot apply health protection strategies.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Applies basic strategies with significant guidance and support.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Applies some appropriate strategies but may miss key protective measures.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Consistently applies effective strategies to protect physical and mental health and wellbeing.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Adapts and combines strategies effectively for different health scenarios.
